name: Calibre Mining Corp.
description: Calibre Mining Corp. is a growing mid-tier gold producer with operations at the Limon and Libertad mines in Nicaragua and the Valentine Gold Mine in Newfoundland, Canada, which commenced production in Q2 2025. The company reported revenue of $585.9 million in 2024 and agreed to a C$1.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Equinox Gold that would create Canada's second-largest gold producer.
